items.title: Le succès n’est pas l’absence d’échecs.
items.snippet:
Le succès n’est pas l’absence d’échecs.
C’est la capacité à continuer malgré eux.

La plupart abandonnent trop tôt.
Les gagnants persévèrent jusqu’à trouver le chemin.

items.title: Le chiffre d’affaires impressionne.
items.snippet:
Le chiffre d’affaires impressionne.

La rentabilité enrichit.

Faire 1, 5 ou 10 millions d’euros de chiffre d’affaires ne veut rien dire si, à la fin, il ne reste pas d’argent.

Le vrai indicateur n’est pas ce que ton entreprise encaisse. C’est ce qu’elle conserve.

Le but d’un business est simple :

items.title: La croissance est un ingrédient essentiel du succès.
items.snippet:
La croissance est un ingrédient essentiel du succès.

Le jour où tu arrêtes d’apprendre, de te challenger et de sortir de ta zone de confort, tu commences à stagner.

Ne tolère pas la médiocrité quand tu es capable de tellement plus.

Ton potentiel est bien plus grand que tu ne l’imagines.

Va cherc

items.title: Arrête de te demander combien ça coûte.
items.snippet:
Arrête de te demander combien ça coûte.

Commence à te demander à quoi cet argent peut servir pour créer davantage de revenus.

Tant que ton argent dort, quelqu’un d’autre l’utilise à ta place.

Les personnes les plus riches ne cherchent pas seulement à économiser. Elles cherchent à faire travailler

items.title: Plus vous apportez de valeur, plus votre revenu a de chances de grandir.
items.snippet:
Plus vous apportez de valeur, plus votre revenu a de chances de grandir.

L’entrepreneuriat, c’est créer, résoudre des problèmes et améliorer la vie des autres. Soyez fier de ce que vous construisez.

items.title: The game is changing. Build high-value skills now or get left behind!
items.snippet: Most people are completely blind to how fast the market is shifting right under their feet. The smart move isn't ignoring the tech wave, it’s building high-value skills right now so you’re the one driving the change, not getting replaced by it.

items.snippet: If hitting higher revenue milestones just brings you more stress, you’re running a corporate daycare. The trap is hiring low-tier talent and expecting high-tier results. items.title: Why entrepreneurs subconsciously build a business prison
items.snippet: If you’re stuck under $100k/mo and drowning in overwhelm, you aren't suffering from a broken funnel, you’re suffering from a lack of focus. Most entrepreneurs subconsciously build themselves a prison because their brains are addicted to complexity, thinking more moving parts equals more success.

items.title: Every deal I’ve done with someone who says they value relationships and morals above everything
items.snippet:
Every deal I’ve done with someone who says they value relationships and morals above everything…has done the exact opposite. 

I prefer dealing with people that just say they want to make money. 

Ironically, it keeps everyone honest.

#shorts #alexhormozi #business #motivation

items.title: I thought he looked familiar...
items.snippet:
“When I was 20 I wanted to be a millionaire…Now that I’m a millionaire, I want to be 20.”

I overheard a version of this.

Makes me realize that when I’m 40, I’d rather be 32 (my age) with nothing, just to be 32 (again). 

A different frame on gratitude I thought I’d share.

#shorts #alexhormozi #bu

items.title: Coolest thing thats happened to me this month. Big fan of @jimmycarr

items.title: Here’s a tell-tale sign that you’re hiring dumb people...
items.snippet:
First time founder: “You need to sign an NDA before I tell you my idea.”

Second time founder: “Here’s everything I’ve got. No one’s gonna care until I make it happen anyways. And it’ll take money, years, and probably won’t work the way we expect.”

#shorts #alexhormozi #business #motivation

items.title: Stop Conserving Your Energy
items.snippet:
You have more energy than you think.

Tony Robbins explains why trying to “save” your energy often holds you back — and how pushing beyond the first uncomfortable moment can unlock a deeper reservoir of power, focus, growth, and momentum.

#TonyRobbins #Energy #Motivation #PersonalGrowth #SelfImprov

items.title: Knowledge Is Only Potential Power
items.snippet:
Knowledge alone doesn’t change your life — execution does.

Tony Robbins explains why information is only potential power until you act on it. Real transformation comes from execution, energy, focus, and using your body and mind together to break old patterns and create momentum.

#TonyRobbins #Exec

items.title: Progress Doesn’t Happen by Accident
items.snippet:
Change is automatic. Progress is not.

Tony Robbins explains why everything in life will change whether you do anything or not — your body, relationships, finances, and the world around you. But real progress requires awareness, intention, and conscious action.

#TonyRobbins #Progress #PersonalGrowt

items.title: What If the Biggest Thing Holding You Back Is You?
items.snippet:
Belief in limits creates limited people.

The ceilings in our lives aren’t always real. They’re stories we build from a few painful moments and accept as the truth about ourselves.

And once we believe it, our actions fall in line with it. We attempt less than we’re truly capable of, and the limit b
